import React from "react"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import UploadImage from "./UploadImage"; // Animation variants for a smooth fade-in and upward motion const containerVariants = { hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, }; const Header = () => (

Radiology & Oncology AI

Elevate your diagnostic capabilities with AI-powered image analysis.

); const UploadSection = () => (

Upload Medical Image for AI Analysis

Submit images in JPG, PNG, or DICOM format for rapid, data-driven insights.

Our secure platform processes your uploads with advanced algorithms in real time.

); const AIReportSection = () => (

AI Report

This chest X-ray reveals multiple noteworthy findings that warrant prompt attention:

  • Foreign Bodies: Multiple circular, high-density objects in the central thorax suggest possible ingestion or aspiration.
  • Consolidation: Areas of increased opacity in the lower lobes—particularly on the right side—could indicate pneumonia, atelectasis, or other pathologies.
  • Potential Pleural Effusion: An obscured costophrenic angle, especially on the left, raises concern for fluid accumulation in the pleural space.
  • Cardiac Silhouette & Mediastinum: The cardiac outline appears within normal limits, and there is no obvious mediastinal widening. A specialized review is recommended for a comprehensive assessment.

Clinical Recommendation: Immediate medical evaluation is advised to address potential airway compromise from the foreign bodies and to further investigate any infection or effusion. Additional imaging or procedures (e.g., bronchoscopy) may be necessary for a definitive diagnosis.

); const FindingsSection = () => (

Comprehensive AI Findings

Our cutting-edge model has evaluated the submitted image and identified these key areas of interest. For definitive interpretation and patient management, please consult a qualified medical professional.

); const Footer = () => (

© {new Date().getFullYear()} Radiology AI. All rights reserved.

Harness the power of intelligent imaging to drive informed clinical decisions.

); function App() { return (
); } export default App;
